Sanitizes nest diagnostic.

## Import

```ts
import { sanitizeNestDiagnostic } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs";
```

## Signature

```ts
function sanitizeNestDiagnostic(
	diagnostic: NestDiagnosticInput,
	defaultPhase: NestDiagnosticPhase = "adapter",
): NestDiagnosticPayload
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `diagnostic` | `NestDiagnosticInput` | Diagnostic input to sanitize. |
| `defaultPhase` | `NestDiagnosticPhase` | Phase to use when the diagnostic does not provide one. |

## Returns

The sanitize nest diagnostic result.

## Example

```ts
import { sanitizeNestDiagnostic } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs";
```

`packages/ts/src/adapters/nestjs.ts`
